steps.title: Your Posts
steps.body: This is where all your blog posts live. Let's walk through creating your first one.

steps.title: Add a New Post
steps.body: Click Next and we'll take you to the post editor.

steps.title: Give Your Post a Title
steps.body: Start here. A clear, specific title helps readers and search engines understand what your post is about.

steps.title: Write Your Content
steps.body: This is the post editor. Write your content here. You can add images, links, and formatting using the toolbar above.

steps.title: Publish When Ready
steps.body: Use the Publish box to save a draft, preview, or publish your post. You can also schedule it for a future date.
